extra.reason: Added MarkdownPreviewView using swift-markdown-ui (.gitHub theme); Cmd+Shift+P toggle in editor toolbar swaps between raw markdown and rendered view. Frontmatter is stripped from the preview.

Tool calls now render as distinct bubbles with SF Symbol per tool, one-line summary parsed from JSON args, and a disclosure showing pretty-printed input + output. Visually attributed to the agent via a leading accent stripe. Agent stream loop refactored to interleave tool messages between assistant text chunks.

Three XCUITest cases added, plus accessibility identifiers on MarkdownPreviewView (markdownPreview) and the DocumentRow rename TextField (renameField). Tests compile and register. Execution blocked by macOS Automation privacy gate in this environment — same error on pre-existing testAppLaunches; needs one-time interactive grant on PunkRecordsUITests-Runner.app.

Anthropic native web_search server tool wired through end-to-end. LLMRequest gained serverTools: [ServerToolConfig]?; ContentBlock gained serverToolUse/serverToolResult cases; AnthropicProvider sends web_search_20250305 in the tools array (after local tools, after cache_control) and parses server_tool_use + web_search_tool_result content blocks; AgentLoop iterates blocks in document order so server tool events interleave with text; chat panel has a Web toggle (@AppStorage). ToolCallInfo gained the web_search case (globe icon, query summary). Tests: 4 deterministic AgentLoopWebSearchTests pass; LiveAgentEvals/liveWebSearchTriggers added (skips without API key).

Removed isAgentMode state, Agent toggle, and the agent-mode branch in sendMessage. Web toggle no longer gated by agent mode. MessageContext.wasAgentMode dropped along with the Issue report 'Mode:' line. Build green; integration tests pass (40).

ChatBubble now renders assistant messages with Markdown(.gitHub) at 0.9em; user messages remain plain Text. Build green; integration tests pass. Visual snapshot coverage tracked separately in PUNK-co8.

terse-v2 promoted as ContextBuilder default and PromptVariant.current. Adds vault_search-vs-web_search routing and inline citation discipline (vault: [[Note]], web: [Title](url)). terse-v1 retained as PromptVariant.terseV1 for historical comparison. Deterministic tests assert template wording + that ContextBuilder emits it; live eval added that requires the agent to pick vault_search over web_search for a vault-answerable prompt (skips without API key). 19 ContextBuilder + 16 Flywheel tests green.

FileSystemDocumentRepository.healDuplicateIDs() walks all docs, groups by id, keeps the lex-smallest path as winner, and rewrites the rest with fresh UUIDs by surgically replacing the id: line inside the frontmatter (body text containing the same UUID is preserved). Wired into AppState.openVault before index rebuild; emits a 'Healed N duplicate document ID(s) on open.' message + console log. 4 new infra tests cover: 2-way win, no-op clean vault, 3-way collision, body-text preservation. 61 infra tests pass; build green.

saveResponseAsNote now pre-extracts wikilinks and web markdown-links from the source, instructs the LLM to preserve them in the prompt, and post-processes the LLM output: any citation that the model dropped gets recovered into an appended '## Sources' section (web links as [Title](url), wikilinks as [[target|display]]). 4 new tests cover: kept-when-preserved, dropped-web-recovery, dropped-wikilink-recovery, and partial-drop survival. 8 NoteCompiler tests green; build green.

Extracted documents+selection bookkeeping into VaultDocumentsState (pure value type in Core). AppState now delegates upsert / remove / applyRename / apply(VaultChange) to it via session.* and exposes documents/selectedDocumentPath/selectedDocument as thin shims. 15 new tests cover: path-first vs id-fallback upsert, selection-follows-rename, selection-clears-on-delete, eager-upsert-then-watcher-event coalescing, and the documented PUNK-kdm collapse limitation. 61 integration tests pass.

Right-click → Move to Trash → Confirm flow covered in DeleteFlowUITests (2 cases: confirm removes row, cancel preserves it). UI-test vault gained a second 'Scratch Note' fixture so the destructive test doesn't empty the vault for parallel runs. SwiftUI confirmationDialog on macOS renders as a sheet, so the helper looks in app.sheets.buttons first, falling back to top-level buttons. 9/9 UI tests pass.

DocumentRow now mirrors its .draggable(fileURL) URL into accessibilityValue (only consumed by --ui-testing). Test asserts the sidebar cell's value ends in 'scratch-note.md' and lives under the PunkRecords-UITest temp vault. Verifies the contract — the URL bound to .draggable points to the right file — without depending on XCUITest synthesizing a drop. Tried in-app drop zones with .dropDestination(for: URL.self) and .onDrop(of: [.fileURL]), press+drag on staticText / cell / coordinates, .slow velocity + hold — none of them fire SwiftUI's drag handler from a List row on macOS. Manual drag-out to Finder still works in production. 10/10 UI tests pass.

Snapshot regression workflow landed: Tests/SnapshotBaselines/ holds 4 baselines captured via RenderPreview (MarkdownPreviewView_Sample + ToolCallBubble InFlight/Completed/Error). Scripts/snapshot-diff.swift decodes two PNGs to RGBA via CGImage and asserts the mean per-channel absolute difference (0–255 scale) is below a threshold (default 2.0) — tolerant of PNG metadata/compression noise but catches real visual change. Scripts/check-snapshots.sh runs the diff over a fresh-render directory matching the baselines by filename; agent workflow is in Tests/SnapshotBaselines/README.md. Tests/PunkRecordsIntegrationTests/SnapshotBaselineSanityTests.swift adds CI guards that baselines exist, decode as valid PNGs, and have reasonable bounds. End-to-end dry run: 4/4 baselines reproduce with mean_diff ≤ 0.02. Sanity tests pass.

OpenAIProvider.completeWithTools now posts to /v1/responses (kept Chat Completions for complete/stream — Ollama/LM Studio compat). Implements: ServerToolConfig.webSearch → {type: web_search} input tool; ToolDefinition → flat function tool; ContentBlock conversation history → input items with sibling function_call / function_call_output. Decodes the output array: web_search_call → .serverToolUse(query); message output_text → .text + synthesizes .serverToolResult with the model's url_citation annotations (or a 'Search completed' placeholder if none); function_call → .toolUse with stopReason=.toolUse. 10 deterministic OpenAIProviderResponsesTests pass; live eval LiveAgentEvals.liveOpenAIWebSearchTriggers skips cleanly without an OpenAI key, runs end-to-end with one. Settings UI already accepts the OpenAI key.

Already implemented. Sources/PunkRecordsApp/Views/RawEditorView.swift:154 defines EditorTextViewRepresentable: NSViewRepresentable wrapping NSTextView.scrollableTextView() with a Coordinator on NSTextViewDelegate. Packages/PunkRecordsInfra/Sources/PunkRecordsInfra/Editor/RegexSyntaxHighlighter.swift provides the regex-based highlighter. Load/save round-trip and dirty-state tracking happen via DocumentEditorViewModel. The editor epic effectively starts at PUNK-qpz (W2 — parser pipeline with swift-markdown + Neon).

Shipped in 2a7d4d9: SidebarFilter pure-function module in Core (11 passing unit tests covering case/diacritic insensitivity, hierarchical context, hit-count correctness, 10k-doc perf floor at 22ms). VaultBrowserView gained a search field with Cmd+Shift+F focus, auto-expanded DisclosureGroups during filter, hit-count badges. Modal SearchView (FTS5 body search) relocated to Cmd+Option+F as 'Find by Content…' so the two search surfaces have distinct keybindings.

Shipped in 49bb2d1: per-chat provider picker (Apple/Claude/GPT), Cmd+1/2/3 shortcuts via hidden buttons in chat panel hierarchy, per-message 'via <Provider>' attribution caption, selection persists across launches via @AppStorage. LLMProviderID gains CaseIterable + displayName in Core with 4 unit tests. Build clean. SidebarFilterTests (earlier in session) confirmed the integration test target compiles; LLMProviderIDTests would have run alongside but XCTest daemon hangs in this environment so they were not executed this session — code is trivial pure-function checks that should pass on a clean run.

Shipped reactive refresh via AppState.vaultChangeTick + count badge in panel header. The autocomplete half of this issue migrated to PUNK-6du (Editor W4) per the editor research; backlinks panel + link-graph (SQLiteSearchIndex.backlinks) was already implemented, this commit adds the missing reactive refresh that prompted the issue.

Shipped HTML export with self-contained styling. cmark-gfm-backed renderer in Core (MarkdownHTMLRenderer), File menu 'Export as HTML…' with Cmd+Shift+E, VaultWindow NSSavePanel handler. 10 unit tests for the renderer. PDF export deferred to a follow-up — the renderer's HTML is print-stylesheet ready so PDF can layer on via WKWebView+printToPDF when needed.

Shipped VaultPaths in Core/Utilities defining the canonical attachments/{note-stem}/{filename} convention with collision handling, sanitization, and markdown reference formatting. 10 unit tests. CLAUDE.md updated with the contract so future paste/drop handlers + screenshot capture + agentic writes all share a single source of truth.

Delivered: swift-markdown + Neon + tree-sitter-markdown wired in. New TreeSitterMarkdownHighlighter (Infra) wraps Neon.TextViewHighlighter for incremental live styling. New CanonicalMarkdownParser (Core) runs on save via swift-markdown. RegexSyntaxHighlighter + protocol removed. 20 new tests pass (7 canonical-parser + 13 highlighter). Editor preview UI test passes. Wikilink/tag styling intentionally deferred to PUNK-6du (W4).

Delivered: HybridUXDecorator (Infra) overlays per-heading font scaling, caret-proximity marker dimming (≤2 chars reveals), blockquote color, and horizontal-rule color on top of TreeSitterMarkdownHighlighter. Wired through RawEditorView.Coordinator on text/selection changes. Code-block backgrounds shipped in W2. 12 new tests pass — perf test confirms decoration on 500-line doc completes in well under one frame (16ms budget). Code-fence CONTENT syntax coloring (the per-language injection piece) carved out into PUNK-tlb so the decorator could ship clean.

Delivered: (1) ⌘O Quick Open palette wired through new QuickOpenView + QuickOpenMatcher (Core) — fuzzy subsequence match with word-boundary and consecutive-run bonuses, ↑/↓/Enter navigation, Esc dismisses. (2) ⌘F find/replace handled by NSTextView's standard NSTextFinder (already had usesFindBar=true + isIncrementalSearchingEnabled=true since W1). Moved 'Find by Content' from ⌘⌥F to ⌘⌥⇧F so ⌘⌥F is free for the standard Edit > Find and Replace menu. 10 matcher tests + UI test pass. Search operates on textStorage.string so dimmed markers are still searchable (fixes the 'Bear bug').

Visual + click-to-open core delivered (per scoping decision): WikilinkPillLayoutManager draws rounded pill backgrounds (TextKit 1) for [[wikilinks]] and #tags; WikilinkDecorator applies pills when caret is outside and reveals raw source when caret enters; resolved links use accent color, unresolved get a dashed underline; #tags get stable hash-derived colors. Click on a resolved pill opens the target note (PillTextView hit-testing). Editor rebuilt on an explicit TK1 stack to host the custom layout manager. 15 new tests pass. Deferred to follow-ups: [[ autocomplete (PUNK-06f), click-to-create for unresolved (PUNK-1wc), tag autocomplete + click-to-filter (PUNK-y4d).

Delivered the testable core: (1) Slash command palette — '/' at line-start/after-whitespace opens a native NSMenu of 13 built-in commands (headings, lists, task, quote, code, table, divider, wikilink, math, callout); selection replaces the /query and places the caret. SlashCommandLibrary (Core) with trigger detection + fuzzy filter, 14 tests. (2) Performance: decoration was O(doc) per keystroke (175s on 10MB!); now limited to the visible range + buffer via EditorDecorationRange — 10MB decorates in ~3.5ms, well under the 50ms frame budget. Scroll re-decorates the newly visible region. 3 perf tests. (3) IME safety: decoration skips while hasMarkedText() so composition isn't disrupted. Deferred to follow-ups: math attachment rendering (PUNK-1oo), full VoiceOver+IME verification pass (PUNK-cmd).

Fixed: editor now sets explicit typingAttributes ({mono font, .foregroundColor: .textColor}) and seeds content via setAttributedString with the same base attrs, so Neon's reset-to-typingAttributes uses an adaptive foreground. Added HybridUXDecorator.fillBodyColor as a safety net that gives any range left without a foreground an adaptive .textColor (without overriding tree-sitter token colors). 2 new regression tests; all 91 Infra tests pass.

Clicking an unresolved [[wikilink]] now prompts (NSAlert) to create a note titled after the link; confirming creates it (H1 + frontmatter title match the link so it resolves afterward) and opens it. Added WikilinkDecorator.ClickAction (.open/.create) + clickAction(at:in:) — unit-tested. PillTextView routes clicks through it; AppState.createNote(titled:) builds on the tested repository.save + FilenameHelpers.uniqueNotePath primitives. 19 wikilink tests pass.

Fenced code blocks now get syntax-colored content via tree-sitter language injection for swift, python, and javascript (js/py aliases too). Added the three grammar SPM deps; pinned python→0.23.6 and javascript→0.23.1 (tagged releases list src/scanner.c explicitly — master branches use a CWD-relative fileExists that drops the external scanner under SPM and fails to link), and swift→0.7.2-with-generated-files (ships the generated parser.c). languageProvider maps fence languages to LanguageConfigurations via the existing bundle-discovery fallback. Theme gained a codeColors palette keyed by capture leading-component (keyword/string/comment/function/type/number/…), wired to the Dracula palette. 17 highlighter tests (incl. grammar loading + color mapping); 104 Infra tests pass.

Typing [[ opens a caret-anchored completion popover (non-activating NSPanel hosting a SwiftUI list) with fuzzy matches over vault titles (QuickOpenMatcher). ↑/↓ navigate, Enter/Tab insert [[Title]] and place the caret past the closing brackets, Esc dismisses, clicks select. Live-updates as you type after [[. WikilinkAutocomplete (Core) does the pure [[-session detection (10 tests) — handles spaces in titles, stops at ]/newline/|, picks the most-recent opener. PillTextView routes keys via doCommand(by:) while visible. 77 Core tests pass; build clean. NOTE: popover positioning/interaction polish needs a visual check in-app.

Tag autocomplete (#-trigger popover reusing the wikilink completion machinery, vault tags as source) + click-to-filter (#tag pill click sets sidebar query to tag:<name>, SidebarFilter gained tag: prefix support). Pure logic in Core TagAutocomplete + SidebarFilter, tag hit-testing in WikilinkDecorator. Tested: Core 14, Infra WikilinkDecorator 23, Integration SidebarFilter 14.

Added tree-sitter grammars for TypeScript (+ts/mts/cts), Rust (+rs), C (+h), C++ (+c++/cc/cxx/hpp/...), plus jsx/mjs JS aliases. TS and C++ highlights.scm only carry derived rules, so makeInheritedCodeConfiguration concatenates parent+child highlight queries (JS→TS, C→C++) and compiles them against the child grammar, with graceful fallback to child-only. Grammar bundles verified embedded in the .app with queries. Tests: Infra 111 green (incl. new resolution + merge tests).
